ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Nel mag. M. Giovanni Badoer, e fratelli ditta dell`Academia Venetiana
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Al letters are both adressed to and signed by Giovanni Badoaro e fratelli Ditta dell`Academia Venetiana.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
